name: sqlbroker-marketplace
description: Plugins for managing local MSSQL access from Claude Code

plugins.name: sqlbroker
plugins.description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code, cross-platform (Windows / macOS / Linux). Three auth modes: SQL login, Windows Authentication, Azure AD service principal. Schema introspection MCP tools (list_objects, get_definition, get_table_schema, get_dependencies) plus connection pool make stored-procedure exploration painless. Service installers: Task Scheduler / launchd / systemd (no NSSM). Includes /sqlbroker:install, /sqlbroker:update, /sqlbroker:add, /sqlbroker:list, /sqlbroker:test, /sqlbroker:rotate, /sqlbroker:remove, /sqlbroker:status.
